personal.name: Samir Randeriya
personal.title: Laravel Backend Specialist
personal.bio: Four years ago, I wrote my first Laravel API endpoint that crashed spectacularly. Today, I architect backend systems that handle thousands of users without breaking a sweat. **The difference?** I learned that great software isn't just about writing code—it's about **solving real problems** for real people. I've spent **4+ years** turning chaotic requirements into **clean, scalable systems** that businesses actually depend on. What drives me? **That moment when a client says their platform finally handles the growth they've been chasing.** I don't just build features—I build the **reliable foundation** that lets startups scale and enterprises move faster. When I'm not deep in Laravel backends or architecting APIs, I'm learning what's next, because standing still isn't an option in this field.

hero.description: I help **startups and enterprises** ship **secure, scalable web applications** faster specializing in **Laravel backend systems** and **modern full-stack solutions** that drive real growth and business impact.

about.title: From Crashing Code to Leading Teams
about.subtitle: The story of how 4+ years of building, breaking, and fixing systems taught me what truly matters: reliable software that drives real business impact.

qualities.title: I Lead by Building
qualities.description: Mentored few junior developers while shipping production code. Leadership isn't titles—it's showing up and solving problems together. With over 4+ years of experience, I've learned that the best way to lead is by building and being a part of the team.

qualities.title: I Obsess Over Performance
qualities.description: A 40% speed boost meant 3x the users could scale seamlessly. Every millisecond matters when growth is on the line.

qualities.title: I Build Secure by Default
qualities.description: Security isn't a feature—it's the foundation. From audits to threat detection, I make sure systems can be trusted.

qualities.title: I Never Stop Learning
qualities.description: The best code I'll write is tomorrow's. Staying curious keeps my solutions ahead of the curve.

cta.title: Let's Build Something That Matters
cta.description: Whether you're scaling a startup or modernizing enterprise systems, I bring 4+ years of battle-tested experience to make it happen.

projects.title: Projects That Solve Real Problems
projects.subtitle: From concept to deployment—here's how I've helped businesses ship better software faster.

projects.title: Meal Vista - A Modern Recipe Search App
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to browse and search for recipes online. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with Laravel and Vue.js, featuring recipe catalog, search functionality, and comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory, coupons, and user management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 10+ core features, enabling customers to search for recipes efficiently.

projects.title: Asset Management
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to track their assets and inventory. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with Laravel and Vue.js, featuring asset catalog, search functionality, and comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory, coupons, and user management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 10+ core features, enabling customers to track their assets efficiently.

projects.title: Hyper Mart - A Modern E-commerce Platform
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to browse and purchase products online. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with Laravel and Vue.js, featuring product catalog, cart system, secure checkout, order tracking, and comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory, coupons, and user management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 10+ core features, enabling customers to purchase products efficiently.

projects.title: Textile Market - A Modern Textile Shopping Platform
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to browse and purchase textiles online. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with ASP.NET and SQL Server, featuring product catalog, cart system, secure checkout, order tracking, and comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory, coupons, and user management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 10+ core features, enabling customers to purchase textiles efficiently.

projects.title: Online Outfit Shopping Platform
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to browse and purchase clothing and accessories online. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with PHP and MySQL, featuring product catalog, cart system, secure checkout, order tracking, and comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory, coupons, and user management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 10+ core features, enabling customers to purchase clothing and accessories efficiently.

projects.title: Online Footwear Shopping Platform
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to browse and purchase footwear online. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with PHP and MySQL, featuring product catalog, cart system, secure checkout, order tracking, and comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory, coupons, and user management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 10+ core features, enabling customers to purchase footwear efficiently.

projects.title: Dynamic File Management System
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to manage their files online. **Solution:** Built a full-stack platform with Laravel and React.js, featuring file catalog, search functionality, and comprehensive admin dashboard for file management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 5+ core features, enabling customers to manage their files efficiently.

projects.title: Google Authentication Application
projects.description: **Challenge:** Customers needed a platform to manage their files online. **Solution:** Built a platform with Vue.js, featuring Google Authentication, JWT Authentication, and comprehensive admin dashboard for file management. **Impact:** Delivered a scalable solution with 5+ core features, enabling customers to manage their files efficiently.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: Real-world impact delivering secure, scalable, and user-centric software solutions across industries.

experiences.title: Senior Lead Software Engineer
experiences.description: Leading frontend development for enterprise-level applications with React.js and TypeScript. Spearheading UI/UX improvements and mentoring junior developers.
achievements: Resolved complex technical issues, improving system stability and reducing bug-related delays across multiple development cycles.
Optimized codebase, resulting in a 40% improvement in application performance and supporting a 3x increase in user traffic without degradation.
Mentored 5 junior developers, leading to a 30% improvement in their code quality and faster onboarding into production-level tasks.
Led the delivery of 5+ high-impact projects, aligning cross-functional teams and maintaining 100% adherence to deadlines and quality benchmarks

experiences.title: Full Stack Developer
experiences.description: Developed and maintained web applications using MERN stack. Collaborated with product team to implement new features and optimize existing functionality.
achievements: Developed 10+ responsive landing pages for client projects
Contributed to company's component library documentation
Participated in daily standups and sprint planning sessions

experiences.title: Web Developer
experiences.description: Developed and maintained web applications using MERN stack. Collaborated with product team to implement new features and optimize existing functionality.
achievements: Collaborated with 4+ cross-functional teams to integrate APIs and services across multiple components, improving overall system interoperability by 30%.
Reviewed and resolved 100+ customer-reported bugs, improving system stability and customer satisfaction by 20%.
Participated in 50+ code reviews, identifying critical issues and contributing to a 15% reduction in post-deployment defects.

reviews.title: Client Reviews & Testimonials

reviews.name: Sarah Johnson
reviews.feedback: Exceptional work! The developer delivered a high-quality React application that exceeded our expectations. Great communication throughout the project and delivered on time.

reviews.name: Michael Chen
reviews.feedback: Outstanding frontend developer with excellent problem-solving skills. Built our entire web platform from scratch with modern technologies. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Emily Rodriguez
reviews.feedback: Perfect blend of technical expertise and creativity. The responsive design looks amazing on all devices and the performance is fantastic. Will definitely work together again.

reviews.name: David Thompson
reviews.feedback: Delivered a complex financial dashboard with excellent code quality. Great attention to detail and security best practices. Professional and reliable.

reviews.name: Lisa Park
reviews.feedback: Incredible work on our client projects. Fast turnaround, pixel-perfect implementations, and excellent communication. Our go-to developer for React projects.

reviews.name: James Wilson
reviews.feedback: Built our entire e-commerce platform with shopping cart, payment integration, and admin panel. Exceeded expectations in terms of quality and performance.
